name: React Native — UI patterns (MEDIUM)
description: Measure with `useLayoutEffect` + `onLayout` + functional size updates. Modern layout: `gap`, `borderCurve: 'continuous'`, CSS-like `boxShadow`, `experimental_backgroundImage` gradients. Dynamic scroll insets: `contentInset` + `scrollIndicatorInsets`; safe areas: `contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior` on root scrollers. Images: `expo-image` (+ blurhash, cachePolicy, recyclingKey). Galleries: Galeria. Menus: Zeego native menus. Sheets: native `Modal` formSheet / native stack formSheet. Pressables: prefer `Pressable` (RN or RNGH) over legacy Touchables. Compound components for buttons (`Button` + `ButtonText` + `ButtonIcon`) instead of polymorphic string children.

metadata.intent: Apply native-first UI patterns for images, menus, modals, layout, and component APIs

must_not: Reimplement platform menus/modals in JS without strong reason
conventions: RNGH `Pressable` inside gesture-handler scroll surfaces when gesture competition matters.

steps.description: Combine synchronous first measure (`useLayoutEffect` / `getBoundingClientRect` when available) with `onLayout` updates; functional `setSize` to dedupe identical dimensions.
Prefer `gap` for sibling spacing; `borderCurve: 'continuous'` with radius; CSS `boxShadow` strings; native gradient via `experimental_backgroundImage` where suitable.
For dynamic bottom/top spacing (keyboard/toolbars), prefer `contentInset` over mutating heavy `contentContainerStyle` padding when it causes relayout churn.
Prefer `contentInsetAdjustmentBehavior="automatic"` on root `ScrollView` when it matches product constraints vs manual safe padding wrappers.
Use `expo-image` for caching, placeholders (`blurhash`), `contentFit`, `priority`, `cachePolicy`, `recyclingKey` in lists.
For lightbox / gallery transitions, prefer `@nandorojo/galeria` over ad-hoc `Modal` + pinch implementations.
Use Zeego (`dropdown-menu`, `context-menu`) for native menus instead of absolutely-positioned custom popovers.
Prefer native `Modal` `presentationStyle="formSheet"` or navigation native form sheets over JS-only bottom sheets for primary flows.
Replace `TouchableOpacity`/`TouchableHighlight` with `Pressable` (RN or RNGH) for new code.
Expose `Button` + `ButtonText` + `ButtonIcon` compound API instead of `children: string | ReactNode` polymorphism that risks invalid text trees.
